source: PROVISIONAL, not confirmed against the primary DSTU 7624:2014 text (DECISIONS.md D-05 revision note, D-41). UAPKI-only (oracles/uapki/library/uapkic/src/dstu7624.c dstu7624_ccm_self_test, ccm_test_data[1]) - no Bouncy Castle CCM vector exists for this variant (BC's CCMModeTests only covers 128/128, 256/256, 256/512, 512/512), so this one case lacks the cross-oracle confirmation the other four variants have. Also the only non-block-aligned (partial final block) case among the five vectors extracted here.
